jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
